title: Xtra Spicy Indian Chicken Curry
description: A quick and spicy Chettinad style curry made with almond essence and whole30 friendly ingredients, this dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the curry powder, almond essence, salt, and cayenne pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Add the canned diced tomatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot over rice or with some naan bread.
